name: Turned Wood Stick Lamp Base Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Create a beautiful interior with the Turned Wood Stick Lamp Base from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This brown lamp base features a round base with turned wood design for a standout look. Designed with a socket turn knob rotary switch, the lamp base has a one-way light setting for easy on and off. Just add a light bulb and lamp shade of your choice to light up your space in style.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
